title: Multi-Agent DAG Scheduler and Mission Control Expansion
summary: Added SQLite-backed pipeline domain: definitions, runs, nodes, artifacts, media jobs, post queue, spend ledger, source registry
Added 8-agent DAG runtime engine with dependency-aware execution and blocking semantics
Added scheduler service for recurring hourly run triggering
Added paid-step approval and budget policy enforcement
Added post queue approval/dispatch flow with adapter abstraction
Added Mission Control APIs for jobs, runs, graph, retry/override, queue, media jobs, and telephony control
Added telephony control client integration for Mission Control
Added integration tests for pipeline + queue + telephony endpoints
rollback_steps: Remove pipeline and telephony control modules
Revert Mission Control pipeline/telephony API and UI changes
Revert mission-control runtime wiring in src/index.ts
Revert notification reason extension and tests
Revert docs/task board/operations and ADR updates
open_items: Implement native OAuth/API adapters for platform publish
Improve source quality and scoring tuning
